strengths: 17+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, infrastructure, embedded, and cloud stacks comfortably meets the experience floor
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq demonstrates genuine builder engagement with the current AI tooling landscape
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective plus consistent external knowledge-sharing (conferences, workshops) shows initiative beyond pure IC execution
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field — both credentials are bachelor's-level (CS and Fine Arts), well below the preferred PhD/Master's bar
AI involvement is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onwards) with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at recognizable scale or with measurable impact

Zero evidence of director-level strategic advising: the resume is entirely IC execution with no customer advisory, executive stakeholder influence, or industry thought leadership at the level this role requires
response.justification: Bogdan has a solid multi-decade engineering background and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but this role demands a recognized AI thought leader capable of advising strategic customers and shaping cloud-AI platform strategy at a director level. His AI engagement is nascent and small-scale, no advanced degree exists, and the resume shows no evidence of executive-level advisory work or industry-wide influence in AI. He fits a strong senior IC profile — not a Principal AI Strategist operating at director scope.
